title: neorudolphia
intro: Neorudolphia is a genus of flowering plants in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the coffee bush or coffee tree due to its coffee-like fragrance. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, particularly in the Caribbean, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Neorudolphia include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. Neorudolphia is often prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in herbal remedies such as ointments and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
